languages.text: Until the end of the turn the negative effect of this augment also triggers on all of its original targets.

traits.locale_text: Until the end of the turn the negative effect of this augment also triggers on all of its original targets.

languages.text: Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, creatures affected by this augment's {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} also trigger this effect once, dealing {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger again from the new targets.
languages.original_text: Until the end of the turn the negative effect of this augment also triggers on all of its original targets.

traits.locale_text: Until the end of the turn, creatures affected by this augment's negative effect also trigger this effect once, dealing damage to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger further from the new targets.

Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, creatures affected by this augment's {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} also trigger this effect once, dealing {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger again from the new targets.

Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, creatures affected by this augment's {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} also trigger this effect once, dealing damage to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger again from the new targets.

Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, creatures affected by this augment's {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} also trigger this effect once, dealing {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger again from the new targets.

languages.text: До конца {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} существа, находящиеся под {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}негативным эффектом{/g} этого аугмента, также однократно активируют этот эффект, нанося {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} существам в радиусе 2 клеток вокруг себя. Этот эффект не срабатывает повторно от новых целей.
languages.original_text: Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, creatures affected by this augment's {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} also trigger this effect once, dealing {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger again from the new targets.

traits.locale_text: До конца {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} существа, находящиеся под {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}негативным эффектом{/g} этого аугмента, также однократно активируют этот эффект, нанося {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} существам в радиусе 2 клеток вокруг себя. Этот эффект не срабатывает повторно от новых целей.

До конца {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} существа, находящиеся под {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}негативным эффектом{/g} этого аугмента, также однократно активируют этот эффект, нанося {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} существам в радиусе 2 клеток вокруг себя. Этот эффект не срабатывает повторно от новых целей.

languages.text: Hasta el final del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, las criaturas afectadas por el {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}efecto negativo{/g} de este aumento también activan este efecto una vez, infligiendo {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} a las criaturas situadas en un radio de 2 casillas a su alrededor. Estos nuevos objetivos no provocan que el efecto se active otra vez.
languages.original_text: Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, creatures affected by this augment's {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} also trigger this effect once, dealing {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger again from the new targets.

traits.locale_text: Hasta el final del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, las criaturas afectadas por el {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}efecto negativo{/g} de este aumento también activan este efecto una vez, infligiendo {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} a las criaturas situadas en un radio de 2 casillas a su alrededor. Estos nuevos objetivos no provocan que el efecto se active otra vez.

languages.text: Bis zum Ende des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} lösen mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negativen Effekt{/g} dieser Augmentation belegte Kreaturen diesen Effekt einmal aus und fügen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 2 Feldern {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g} zu. Die neuen Ziele aktivieren diese Effekte nicht.
languages.original_text: Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, creatures affected by this augment's {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} also trigger this effect once, dealing {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger again from the new targets.

traits.locale_text: Bis zum Ende des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} lösen mit dem {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negativen Effekt{/g} dieser Augmentation belegte Kreaturen diesen Effekt einmal aus und fügen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 2 Feldern {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g} zu. Die neuen Ziele aktivieren diese Effekte nicht.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Tur{/g} bitimine dek bu ogmentin {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}olumsuz etkilerinden{/g} etkilenen yaratıklar da bu etkiyi bir kez tetikler ve kendi etraflarındaki 2 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan yaratıklara {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verirler. Bu etki, yeni hedeflerden dolayı bir kez daha tetiklenmez.
languages.original_text: Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, creatures affected by this augment's {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} also trigger this effect once, dealing {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger again from the new targets.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Tur{/g} bitimine dek bu ogmentin {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}olumsuz etkilerinden{/g} etkilenen yaratıklar da bu etkiyi bir kez tetikler ve kendi etraflarındaki 2 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan yaratıklara {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verirler. Bu etki, yeni hedeflerden dolayı bir kez daha tetiklenmez.

languages.text: Jusqu'à la fin du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, les créatures affectées par l'{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}effet négatif{/g} de cette augmentation déclenchent également cet effet une fois, infligeant des {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} aux créatures dans un rayon de 2 cases autour d'elles. Les nouvelles cibles ne le déclenchent pas à nouveau.
languages.original_text: Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, creatures affected by this augment's {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} also trigger this effect once, dealing {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger again from the new targets.

traits.locale_text: Jusqu'à la fin du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, les créatures affectées par l'{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}effet négatif{/g} de cette augmentation déclenchent également cet effet une fois, infligeant des {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} aux créatures dans un rayon de 2 cases autour d'elles. Les nouvelles cibles ne le déclenchent pas à nouveau.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束前，受此植入物{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}负面效果{/g}影响的生物也会触发一次该效果，对其2格内的生物造成{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}。该效果不会从新目标身上再次触发。
languages.original_text: Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, creatures affected by this augment's {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} also trigger this effect once, dealing {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger again from the new targets.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束前，受此植入物{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}负面效果{/g}影响的生物也会触发一次该效果，对其2格内的生物造成{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}。该效果不会从新目标身上再次触发。

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了まで、このオーグメティックの{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}負の効果{/g}の影響を受けているクリーチャーもこの効果を1回発動し、自身を中心とした半径2マス以内のクリーチャーに{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}を与える。この効果は新たな対象から再度発動することはない。
languages.original_text: Until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, creatures affected by this augment's {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} also trigger this effect once, dealing {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to creatures within a 2-cell radius around themselves. This effect does not trigger again from the new targets.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了まで、このオーグメティックの{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}負の効果{/g}の影響を受けているクリーチャーもこの効果を1回発動し、自身を中心とした半径2マス以内のクリーチャーに{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}を与える。この効果は新たな対象から再度発動することはない。
